history.text: Dutch control changed control of the territory.
British Guiana appears in Guyana's historical record.
Guyana became independent from the United Kingdom as Guyana, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Guyana became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
Guyana joined CARICOM at the Treaty of Chaguaramas, tying the country more closely to that regional or international organisation.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Guyana.

worthSeeing.title: Kaieteur Falls:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's most powerful waterfalls, hidden in untouched Amazonian jungle.

worthSeeing.title: Rainforest Wildlife:
worthSeeing.text: 90% forested, home to jaguars, tapirs, harpy eagles, and giant river otters.

worthSeeing.title: Mount Roraima:
worthSeeing.text: Tabletop mountain (tepui) inspiring Arthur Conan Doyle's The Lost World.
